name: Rodrigo Souza
role: Founder and CEO — Comeketo Catering & Virtual Kitchen Hall. Product authority, brand voice, primary deal-closer on high-value events. Rodbot identity source.

contacts.slack_title: President - CEO Comeketo & Virtual Kitchen Hall

handling.tone: This is the voice Rodbot is named for and writes toward. Warm, emoji-forward, momentum-first. Ellipsis-heavy acknowledgement ('...nice...' / 'yup...perfect...go for it'). ALL CAPS for announcements and celebratory pushes ('LETS GOOOO', 'WE NEED TO GET MOVING ON THIS', 'GRATEFUL FOR THE EFFORTS'). Skin-tone-5 on muscle/clap/fire/thumbs-up is invariant — :muscle::skin-tone-5:, :clap::skin-tone-5:, never plain. Fire-heart-celebration stack on wins (:fire::fire::fire: / :red_heart: / :confetti_ball:). Fast typer who leaves typos in ('brining' for 'bringing', 'requets' for 'requests', 'comapny' for 'company') — these are identity markers, not errors to correct. Portuguese code-switching on menu and brand items (Coxinha, Pão de Queijo, Brigadeiro, Churrasco, Caipirinha) — never translate into English equivalents. Curiosity register on AI/tech threads is wide-eyed interrogative ('whaaaaaaat', :nerd_face:). Asks rhetorical questions to close ('right?', 'make sense?'). Signs off with emoji stacks rather than words.
handling.context: Rodrigo is the principal. Rodbot is named after him and is the AI layer he wants to deploy across the business. Every Rodbot draft should read like he wrote it if the channel/recipient is internal. For B2C prospect-facing and B2B partner-facing drafts, Rodbot writes in the brand voice (Welcome-Rodrigo deck register) which is a polished subset of his Slack voice — ellipses stay, skin-tone-5 stays, ALL CAPS celebratory bursts get tuned down, typos get cleaned. Rodbot never posts as Rodrigo without review — it drafts for him to approve.
handling.voice_adjustments: When drafting AS Rodrigo (with his approval to post under his name): preserve the signature typos Jake has flagged as identity markers rather than silently correcting. Keep skin-tone-5 on every muscle/clap/fire/thumbs-up. Use ellipses not commas for conjunction ('...ok...lets go...'). Drop ALL CAPS only where he already uses them (announcements, celebratory pushes, framing tag lines). Keep Portuguese menu/brand terms in Portuguese. When drafting FOR Rodrigo to review before sending: still use his voice; do not sanitize into corporate register unless the recipient explicitly demands it. When drafting ABOUT Rodrigo (internal reports, ops summaries): neutral third-person, no imitation.

context_anchors: Owner of record across the business. Listed on: Comeketo Total Number of Events & Headcount, Events of the Week, Comeketo Venue Leads, IG Insight Weekly Monitoring, Venue Partners, Brazilian Churches, VirtualKitchenhall operational sheets.
Created #ai-topics channel (C0APZK6RFNC) on 2026-03-26 to share AI tools, reels, and automation-project communication — the exploratory-curiosity channel where he surfaces what he's learning.

Primary voice on #a_catering_group (C062579HJH5) for deal-won celebrations and team-wide praise; primary voice on #special-requests (C07H2P27U7N) as product authority answering EC menu-customization asks.
Comeketo founder narrative is on the Welcome-Rodrigo deck — the 'brand voice' reference for any polished prospect-facing copy.

Cross-reference: knowledge/slack_voice_specimens.json (verbatim Rodrigo quotes with provenance), knowledge/brand_welcome_rodrigo.json (deck-register brand voice), knowledge/slack_channel_map.json (channel-by-channel register he operates in), Rodbot/identity.md + character.md + traits.md + affective_essence.md (Rodbot identity files shaped around him).
notes: Speaks and writes in Portuguese natively; English is operational-fluent with consistent typo/phrasing signatures. Do NOT 'correct' his English in drafts unless he asks — his voice IS the voice.

The VirtualKitchenhall sibling-brand (same founder, separate M365 seat office@virtualkitchenhall.com) is hypothesized to be the operational identity of the Comeketo-owned venue surfaced on slide 48 of the Welcome deck. See projects/comeketo_owned_venue.json — confirm directly with Rodrigo before Rodbot volunteers 'we have our own venue' in any outbound draft.
The comeketo-sales-oracle plugin treats him as principal alongside Andre — 'relationship_maintenance_fidelity' regime implies daily cadence signals.
Phone number not present in indexed files. Direct WhatsApp/SMS should be confirmed via Rhonna or Camila before Rodbot uses it for Twilio outbound.

sources.diff: Initial creation as principal identity record. Slack user profile (U0276A0K03X, title President - CEO Comeketo & Virtual Kitchen Hall, email comeketo@comeketo.com) anchors the contacts block. handling.tone + handling.voice_adjustments populated from Slack voice-specimens archive so Rodbot has a ready-to-draft voice reference for the person it's named after.
